name: LABCORP HOLDINGS INC.
summary: PART I Labcorp Holdings Inc. is a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services that provides vital information to help doctors, hospitals, pharmaceutical companies, researchers, and patients make clear and confident decisions. The Company provides insights and accelerates innovations to improve health and improve lives through its unparalleled diagnostics and drug development laboratory capabilities.
